Variables.Name: EngineTestModules
Variables.Description: Modules to load that have engine tests

Variables.Name: EditorTestModules
Variables.Description: Modules to load that have editor tests

Variables.Name: AutomationTestmap
Variables.Description: The automation test map to be used for several of the automation tests.

Variables.Name: EditorPerformanceTestMaps
Variables.Description: The map to be used for the editor performance capture tool.

Variables.Name: AssetsToOpen
Variables.Description: Asset to test for open in automation process

Variables.Name: TestLevelFolders
Variables.Description: Folders containing levels to exclude from automated tests

Variables.Name: ExternalTools
Variables.Description: External executables and scripts to run as part of automation.

Variables.Name: LaunchOnSettings
Variables.Description: The map and device type to be used for the editor Launch On With Map Iterations test.

Variables.Name: DefaultScreenshotResolution
Variables.Description: The default resolution to take all automation screenshots at.
